feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman and Red left Pokemon Tower on foot and reached Route 8, keeping the Silph Scope lead grounded in Kanto's route network.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red marked Route 8 as the westbound road toward Celadon and warned that Rocket wants Antman to chase the clue.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill traced the Silph Scope signal toward Celadon rather than deeper into Pokemon Tower.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Rocket's Game Corner front in Celadon is now the strongest Silph Scope lead.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Team Moonlight left a shadow on Route 8, proving Lavender's dream pressure is spreading beyond the tower.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: The Underground Path to Celadon is unlocked as the next physical travel step.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Celadon City is now teased as the next major Kanto story hub for the Silph Scope thread.
